description: Style Note With the temperatures soaring, your fashion choices demand style and comfort. This white dress from tonga is a must buy. With a stylish cut and a well fitted bodice, this dress would look great worn with high heels. Choose chic accessories to complete your look. Product Details A white tube dress which comes with a dark brown belt, has an elasticised neckline, permanent pleated ruffle, a plain white well fitted bodice and has permanent pleats from the waist down with a gentle flair, the belt has a weaved look and comes with a tiny metallic buckle Material and Care 62% polyester, 35% rayon and 3% spandex Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
